title: SONGWAY Butterfly Cat Toy Wand - 13 PCS Interactive Cat Toy for Indoor Cat Kitten, 1 Retractable Cat Wand and 12 Butterfly Cat Toys Refills with Bells, Cat Fishing Pole Toy
features: [13 PIECES CAT TOYS]: Our cat toy set includes 12 PCS small butterfly teaser baits and 1 retractable cat teaser wand; All cat toys teaser have bells, which can attract cats' interest and stimulate its instinct

[QUALITY AND SAFE MATERIAL]: Cat wand toys are made of high-quality fabric materials, non-toxic, eco-friendly, safe and healthy for your pets and family; high-strength wands is retractable and can extends from 38cm (15In) to 94cm (37In). Durable foam handle grip is non-slip and comfortable to hold
[UNIQUE TEASER BAITS]: This cat teaser toy with colourful and vivid insect butterfly toys, lightweight and portable, easy to hang and replace, bring more play options and fun to cats.

[KEEP CATS HEALTHY & ACTIVE]: These cat toys will be spinning like real butterfly when waving in the air, triggering feathers front-end bells; Activate your cat's hunting instincts and release its natural instincts and cause it to flip, jump, chase, and hunt around; your cat will get more exercise, improve their agility and immunity, reduce obesity and anxiety

[PLAY WITH YOUR CAT]: Enjoy hours playing with your cat in a super fun way with just a flick of your wrist or finger. Our cat toys wand perfect for strengthen the relationships between you and your cat and reducing the distance of playing together, You can change the teaser's head and adjust cat toy wand to make more fun for you and your cats. it will be the memorable playing time! (Note: Please always supervise your cat while playing, to avoid swallowing the toy pieces).
description: Product Description SONGWAY Interactive Cat Toy – 13 Piece Cat Toy Set with Retractable Bars and 12 Butterfly Replacement with Bells, Feather Rod Cat Toy This cat toy set contains a retractable rod and 9 colourful butterfly toy teasers. Handmade realistic and vibrant small butterfly, activate your cat's hunting instincts. All refills are equipped with bells that can attract the cat's attention and increase fun. Safe fabric material and carbon fibre cat rod with EVA handle, safe, durable and comfortable. Product details: Simulation Little Butterfly Handmade vibrant cat toys. Realistic butterflies attract the cat's attention and stimulate the cat's hunting nature instinct as they "fly". Make sure your cat does not swallow. Cat butterfly toy with bell All colourful baits have bells when the feather toys wave in the air and trigger the bells, which can awaken the cat's interest and stimulate their instinct. Durable hook The hook is strong and durable, it is convenient to replace feather bait, which brings more fun to the cat. Songway 13 pieces vibrant butterfly cat toys, the best gift for your fur baby Attention: Please always supervise your cat when playing to avoid swallowing the toy parts.
